message:
fix(security): length-prefix hash inputs across 19 files to prevent delimiter-collision attacks

Replace `hasher.update(b"|")` delimiters between variable-length fields with
`(field.len() as u64).to_le_bytes()` length prefixes. Without length-prefixing,
an attacker controlling adjacent free-form string fields can craft inputs that
produce identical SHA-256 hashes (e.g., key="a|b" + value="c" collides with
key="a" + value="b|c"). Also prefix collection counts to prevent element-boundary
confusion.

Files fixed: time_travel_engine, time_travel, audience_token, incident_lab,
proof_carrying_decode, eviction_saga, migration_pipeline, capability_artifact,
claim_compiler (2), evidence_replay_gate, staking_governance, proof_generator,
profile_tuning_harness, mitigation_synthesis, durable_claim_gate,
impossible_default, incident_bundle_retention, durability_violation

All 5594 tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
